preamble: The retraction of the voiced alveolar fricative [z] to the voiced retroflex fricative [ʐ]. This process of hardening mirrors the voiceless shift of [s] to [ʂ].

examples.note: The hardening of historical voiced sibilants into retroflexes.

sources: Shevelov, G. Y. (1964). A Prehistory of Slavic.
Swan, O. E. (2002). A Grammar of Contemporary Polish.
